rationale.R1.1: The artifact proposes a new framework and needs to clearly reconstruct its conceptual object, including the problem it solves and how it differs from prior approaches.
rationale.R1.4: The artifact makes novelty claims about its approach and needs to assess whether these claims are supported by evidence and properly positioned relative to prior work.
